Visit IranStrike — Live Missile Tracker

Free real-time missile tracker and live radar for the Iran vs Israel conflict. Watch every strike, drone launch, interception, and military event on a live tactical map — updated every 3 minutes from 6+ OSINT intelligence sources.

IranStrike aggregates reports from verified Telegram OSINT channels (CIG Intel, BNO News, Aurora Intel, OSINT Defender, and others), official Israeli Home Front Command alerts, and infrastructure monitoring services. AI classifies each report into event types — strikes, interceptions, drone launches, troop movements — and plots them on a live tactical radar map within minutes.

IranStrike monitors military activity across Israel, Iran, Lebanon (Hezbollah), Syria, Iraq (Iranian militias), and Yemen (Houthis). The live radar map shows events in real time across all six conflict zones with AI-classified event types and severity levels.

IranStrike provides a live missile radar and real-time conflict monitor covering the Iran vs Israel military confrontation. Track every missile launch, drone strike, and interception on our tactical radar map. Our live tracker aggregates data from verified OSINT sources across the Middle East including Israel, Iran, Lebanon, Syria, Iraq, and Yemen.

Yes. IranStrike is a free live missile tracker and radar that monitors every strike, interception, drone launch, and military event in the Iran vs Israel conflict in real time. It displays events on an interactive tactical map updated every 3 minutes from 6+ verified intelligence sources.

Yes. IranStrike is completely free with no account, subscription, or signup required. It works on any device with a web browser and provides the same live conflict data available to professional analysts and OSINT researchers.
